citations.desc: Environment enhancement to promote psychological well-being.
citations.narrative:
3.154 – Environmental enhancement for birds
The birds at the facility did not have an environmental enhancement plan that was approved by the attending veterinarian.
Failure to maintain and follow an approved written plan can be detrimental to the psychological health and well-being of
the animals. The environment enhancement plan must be in place to promote the psychological well-being of the birds.
The licensee must provide and follow an enrichment plan that is approved by their attending veterinarian.
Correct By: March 13, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
Additional Inspectors:
Patricia Laracuente, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n
